commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=43fa4b0230f8d14249edc09721b2830ff7f23774)
commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows Codex app-server assistant item completion so it no longer releases a turn after a tool handoff, and adds a focused regression test.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +76. Total +79 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can arm assistant-output release from a completed agentMessage even after tool handoff because the item-completion predicate returns true before the raw-assistant handoff guard applies. I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the blockers are contributor-supplied real behavior proof, docs alignment, and maintainer compatibility acceptance rather than a safely automatable repair.

target.title: fix(codex): wait for turn completion after post-tool handoff
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes premature Codex Harness turn completion after a tool handoff.

## What Problem This Solves

After a Codex turn has crossed a tool handoff, an assistant `item/completed` notification is not a reliable final-answer boundary. The model may still be continuing the same Codex turn, and the correct release signal is `turn/completed`.

This was an item-level versus turn-level lifecycle mismatch in the native Codex app-server runtime plugin:

- Before tool handoff, a completed assistant item can release the turn.
- After tool handoff, completed assistant items can be intermediate progress/narration while the same turn continues.
- Codex ACP does not hit the same failure mode because its collector finishes on the turn-level completion boundary.

## Changes

- `isAssistantCompletionReleaseNotification(...)` now returns false once the turn has crossed a tool handoff.
- Existing post-tool wait behavior is updated to complete only after `turn/completed`.
- Adds one regression test for the failing lifecycle: post-tool assistant item completion without `turn/completed` must not release the run.

The PR is intentionally limited to 2 files and 1 commit.

## Evidence

Current PR head: `43fa4b02`.

- `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.turn-watches.test.ts -t "does not release post-tool assistant items without turn completion|keeps waiting when a current-turn item is still active"` -> 1 file passed, 2 tests passed, 63 skipped.
- `git diff --check` -> passed.
target.author: marchpure

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
